rule_metadata.name: Check_Wine
rule_metadata.Author: Nick Hoffman
rule_metadata.Description: Checks for the existence of Wine

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule Check_Wine
{
	meta:
		Author = "Nick Hoffman"
		Description = "Checks for the existence of Wine"
		Sample = "de1af0e97e94859d372be7fcf3a5daa5"

	strings:
		$wine = "wine_get_unix_file_name"

	condition:
		$wine and pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetModuleHandleA" )
}
